rows.name: Updated Category
rows.description: A refreshing range of chilled drinks made with tea, coffee, taro and slush options. Enjoy them plain or customised with your choice of boba for the perfect cool-down treat.

rows.name: Hot Beverages 熱飲
rows.description: Premium Lavazza coffee/ organic tea/ hot chocolate to warm your heart n-store

rows.name: Asian Sweet Bites 甜品
rows.description: A delightful collection of classic Asian sweets featuring soft, chewy mochi at the heart of the menu. Indulge in silky boba crème caramel and fluffy, sweet pillow brioche—comforting, delicate desserts with authentic Asian flavours.

rows.name: Asian Rice • Noodle • Bread 主餐
rows.description: A carefully curated selection of authentic Asian rice, noodles, traditional flatbreads, and thick brioche. From light and chewy to fluffy and buttery, each variety highlights comforting flavours and true Asian craftsmanship.
